name: diagSetTarget
title: diagSetTarget
description: Sets the target ECU with which the tester shall communicate from now on and configures/establishes the communication channel to that ECU.
After calling the function in the tester, the following actions are executed:

parameters.name: ecuName
parameters.description: Qualifier of the ECU as set in the diagnostic configuration dialog for the respective diagnostic description (CDD/ODX).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
